_comment: Curated allowlist of known-flaky test signatures (substring-matched against a gate/CI failTail). When the local gate fails ONLY on one of these AND the failure is disjoint from the fix's target files (no suspicious overlap), the gate classifies it as a flake instead of quarantining a good fix. Keep this list SHORT and specific — every entry is a test we've chosen to trust over the gate. Surfaced offenders from the dogfood runs: the headless stream-json and list-models probes (environment/credential-sensitive).
